creator: stephen@missouri.edu
text:
Dear maintainer of sysutils/byobu,

PR ports/158731 has been filed, and it references your port.

Here is the full text
http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/158731

(Sorry, last time I told you it was ports/158732.  This is a different 
PR that needs a different fix.)
